name: logistics supervisors at freight brokers processing 10–50 shipments/week tool
description: For logistics supervisors at freight brokers processing 10–50 shipments/week, delivery delays cause missed deadlines. We automatically flag delays instead of manual tracking and reporting of delivery times.
target_audience: logistics supervisors at freight brokers processing 10–50 shipments/week
problem_solved: Inability to track delivery delays in real-time, leading to missed deadlines.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to track delivery delays in real-time, leading to missed deadlines.

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking and reporting of delivery times
